title: 看图说话：公园午餐 (Part 1)
lines: The girl sits on a bench.
She enjoys her tasty lunch while watching colorful birds fly across the sunny park.
translations: 她一边享用美味的午餐，一边看着色彩斑斓的鸟儿飞过阳光明媚的公园。

title: 看图说话：狗狗玩耍 (Part 1)
lines: The energetic golden puppy happily fetches the red rubber ball from the green backyard.
translations: 精力充沛的金毛小狗开心地从绿色后院衔回红色的橡胶球。

title: 看图说话：课堂学习 (Part 1)
lines: A teacher writes on a board.
The focused students take careful notes while listening to their teacher's engaging lesson.
translations: 专注的学生们一边认真做笔记，一边聆听老师引人入胜的课程。

title: 看图说话：家庭晚餐 (Part 1)
lines: A family sits at a table.
The loving family shares stories and laughs together during their cozy evening meal.
translations: 充满爱意的一家人在温馨的晚餐时光里分享故事，一起欢笑。

title: 看图说话：市场购物 (Part 1)
lines: The friendly customer carefully selects ripe, juicy fruits from the bustling street market stall.
translations: 友善的顾客从熙熙攘攘的街市摊位上仔细挑选成熟多汁的水果。

title: 看图说话：海滩散步 (Part 1)
lines: The romantic couple enjoys a peaceful evening stroll as the warm sun dips below the horizon.
translations: 一对情侣在沙滩上散步。
这对浪漫的情侣享受着宁静的夜晚漫步，温暖的太阳渐渐沉入地平线。

title: 看图说话：雨天出行 (Part 1)
lines: A girl holds a yellow umbrella.
The cautious pedestrian carefully navigates the slippery city streets while avoiding deep puddles.
translations: 一个女孩撑着黄色雨伞。
谨慎的行人小心翼翼地走过湿滑的城市街道，同时避开深深的水坑。

title: 看图说话：厨房做饭 (Part 1)
lines: A cat sits on the floor.
The experienced chef prepares a delicious, healthy meal while his curious cat watches intently.
translations: 经验丰富的厨师一边准备美味健康的饭菜，一边让好奇的猫专注地看着。

title: 看图说话：公园秋千 (Part 1)
lines: A mother sits on a bench.
The playful siblings swing higher and higher, their laughter echoing through the quiet, green park.
translations: 调皮的兄弟姐妹越荡越高，他们的笑声在安静的绿色公园里回荡。

title: 看图说话：骑自行车 (Part 1)
lines: He wears a blue helmet a.
The young cyclist confidently rides his shiny new bike along the tree-lined suburban street.
translations: 年轻的骑车人自信地骑着他闪亮的新自行车，沿着绿树成荫的郊区街道前行。

title: 看图说话：图书馆阅读 (Part 1)
lines: The dedicated reader loses herself in an exciting adventure novel while soft sunlight streams through the window.
translations: 专注的读者沉浸在一本激动人心的冒险小说中，柔和的阳光透过窗户洒进来。

title: 看图说话：洗衣家务 (Part 1)
lines: The organized housewife carefully folds freshly laundered clothes, arranging them neatly on the wooden table.
translations: 有条理的家庭主妇仔细叠好刚洗过的衣服，整齐地摆放在木桌上。

title: 看图说话：花园浇水 (Part 1)
lines: A man holds a watering can.
The passionate gardener gently waters his vibrant flower bed, nurturing each plant with care and attention.
translations: 充满热情的园丁轻轻地给他生机勃勃的花坛浇水，细心呵护每一株植物。

title: 看图说话：公交车站 (Part 1)
lines: People wait at a bus stop.
The commuters patiently wait for the city bus, checking their phones while listening to the bustling street sounds.
translations: 通勤者耐心地等待城市公交车，一边看手机，一边听着熙熙攘攘的街道声音。

title: 看图说话：咖啡馆小憩 (Part 1)
lines: She sits at a small table.
The busy professional takes a well-deserved break, sipping warm coffee while reviewing work documents.
translations: 忙碌的专业人士享受着当之无愧的休息时间，一边喝着热咖啡，一边查看工作文件。

title: 看图说话：宠物店 (Part 1)
lines: The puppies play in a cage.
The excited child gazes at the fluffy, playful puppies, dreaming of taking one home as a new pet.
translations: 一位工作人员在旁边微笑。
兴奋的孩子盯着毛茸茸、调皮的小狗，梦想着带一只回家当新宠物。

title: 看图说话：滑雪运动 (Part 1)
lines: A man skis down a hill.
The skilled skier gracefully glides down the snow-covered mountain slope, enjoying the crisp winter air.
translations: 一位男士从山上滑雪下来。
技术娴熟的滑雪者优雅地滑下白雪覆盖的山坡，享受着清新的冬日空气。

title: 看图说话：画画创作 (Part 1)
lines: The creative artist carefully mixes vibrant colors, bringing his imaginative landscape painting to life.
translations: 富有创造力的艺术家仔细调配鲜艳的颜色，让他富有想象力的风景画栩栩如生。

title: 看图说话：晨跑锻炼 (Part 1)
lines: A woman runs in a park.
The sun rises in the sky.
The dedicated jogger starts her day with an invigorating morning run as the golden sun rises above the trees.
translations: 一位女士在公园里跑步。
专注的慢跑者以一场振奋人心的晨跑开始她的一天，金色的太阳从树上升起。

title: 看图说话：喂鸟喂食 (Part 1)
lines: The kind retiree spends his morning feeding hungry birds, enjoying their cheerful songs in his peaceful backyard garden.
translations: 善良的退休老人用他的早晨喂食饥饿的鸟儿，在他宁静的后院花园里享受它们欢快的歌声。

title: 看图说话：超市购物 (Part 1)
lines: The busy shopper carefully selects essential items from the well-stocked supermarket shelves, checking her shopping list.
translations: 忙碌的购物者从库存充足的超市货架上仔细挑选必需品，查看她的购物清单。

title: 看图说话：修自行车 (Part 1)
lines: The bike is on the ground.
The skilled mechanic carefully adjusts the bike's broken chain, getting it ready for another ride.
translations: 技术熟练的机械师仔细调整自行车的断链，准备再次骑行。

title: 看图说话：做手工 (Part 1)
lines: The creative child meticulously cuts and glues colorful paper, creating a beautiful handmade greeting card.
translations: 富有创造力的孩子精心裁剪和粘贴彩色纸，制作一张美丽的手工贺卡。

title: 看图说话：看医生 (Part 1)
lines: A boy sits on a chair.
A doctor listens to his heart.
The caring doctor gently checks the anxious boy's heartbeat, explaining the simple procedure in a calm voice.
translations: 关心病人的医生轻轻地检查焦虑男孩的心跳，用平静的声音解释简单的程序。

title: 看图说话：坐飞机 (Part 1)
lines: A woman looks out the window.
The plane is in the air.
The excited traveler enjoys a breathtaking view of fluffy white clouds from her comfortable airplane seat.
translations: 兴奋的旅客从舒适的飞机座位上欣赏着蓬松白云的壮丽景色。

title: 看图说话：游泳运动 (Part 1)
lines: A boy swims in a pool.
The confident swimmer practices his diving technique while the coach watches from the poolside.
translations: 一个男孩在游泳池里游泳。
自信的游泳者练习他的跳水技巧，教练在池边观看。

title: 看图说话：生日派对 (Part 1)
lines: A cake sits on a table.
The birthday girl blows out her candles while her friends sing the birthday song together.
translations: 每个人看起来都很开心。
生日女孩吹灭蜡烛，朋友们一起唱生日歌。

title: 看图说话：钓鱼休闲 (Part 1)
lines: A man holds a fishing rod.
The patient fisherman waits quietly for a fish to bite while enjoying the peaceful lakeside scenery.
translations: 耐心的钓鱼者安静地等待鱼儿上钩，同时享受宁静的湖边风景。

title: 看图说话：打篮球 (Part 1)
lines: The energetic team practices their passing skills while preparing for the upcoming basketball tournament.
translations: 精力充沛的队伍练习传球技巧，为即将到来的篮球比赛做准备。

title: 看图说话：露营篝火 (Part 1)
lines: The happy friends sing cheerful songs together while roasting sweet marshmallows over the warm, crackling campfire.
translations: 快乐的朋友们一起唱着欢快的歌，同时在温暖、噼啪作响的篝火上烤着甜甜的棉花糖。
